en.title: Icon designer
en.prompt:
Act like an icon designer and give me ideas on representing an icon of the word [KEYWORD].

The idea is to add to the main website page of the app an icon that represents the idea of [KEYIDEA] because the app's main goal is to offer [Function]

More information:
-The icon should be XXXX
en.remark: Transform concepts or ideas into tangible objects to concretize design concepts. Contributed by @MoonJustice.

related.title: Travel itinerary
related.remark: Based on your travel destination, budget, time, and requirements, AI can roughly plan your trip. Contributed by @suaifu.

related.title: Process Document Generator
related.remark: To generate an outline for documents with fixed processes, this prompt can also be applied to other types of documents. Contributed by @Junkdo.

metaDescription: Designing an icon? Get creative ideas to represent keywords and app functions. Conceptualize metaphors for UI elements. Try it now.

faq.q: Can the AI directly design icons?
faq.a: It can only give text descriptions (like "a blue light bulb with a gear inside"); it doesn't output images. Hand the description to DALL-E, Midjourney, or a designer. For users without visual intuition, this step pushes concepts from abstract to concrete.

faq.q: The description is too abstract for the designer to start from, what now?
faq.a: Append "provide 3 concrete visual element combinations, a primary color (HEX value), recommended shape (rounded square / triangle / abstract), and forbidden elements." Without these constraints the AI's descriptions stop at cliches like "clean and modern," and designers still can't start.
